THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPPEN ANN MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORMAN SABEL AUTO REPAIR $292.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
